tests.scenario: Access meditation content as a new user
steps: Browse meditation content without logging in
tests.expected_result: No paywall or subscription request appears

tests.scenario: Access meditation content after logging in
tests.expected_result: All meditation content is accessible without any paywall or subscription prompt
No advertisements are visible during the meditation session

tests.scenario: User uses app's meditation content for an extended period
steps: Select a meditation session and use it for 30 minutes
tests.expected_result: No advertisements are displayed during or after the extended meditation session

tests.scenario: Continuous playback of sleep content for 8 hours
steps: Verify sleep content is still playing
tests.expected_result: Sleep content continues to play without interruption
Sleep content stops immediately

steps: Check the duration of the sleep story
tests.expected_result: The duration is at least 30 minutes

steps: Select a sleep story with duration exactly 30 minutes
Verify the story plays for the full duration
tests.expected_result: The story plays without interruption for the full 30 minutes
The meditation session starts without ads or payment requests.

steps: Open the app as a guest
tests.expected_result: The meditation session starts without ads or payment requests.

tests.scenario: Reopen a favorite support session with one favorite saved
steps: Save a support session as a favorite
tests.expected_result: The support session is reopened

tests.scenario: Reopen a favorite support session with multiple favorites saved
steps: Save multiple support sessions as favorites
tests.expected_result: The selected support session is reopened
The user's current meditation streak is displayed on the home screen

steps: Ensure user has not meditated recently
tests.expected_result: The user's meditation streak is displayed as 0 on the home screen
The completed course is displayed in the list of completed courses with 100% progress

tests.scenario: User partially completes a meditation course
tests.expected_result: The course is displayed in the list of courses with 50% progress

steps: Launch Medito app on primary device
tests.expected_result: User is logged in and sees meditation progress on primary device

tests.scenario: Login on secondary device with same credentials
steps: Launch Medito app on secondary device
tests.expected_result: User is logged in and sees same meditation progress on secondary device as on primary device

steps: Update Medito app to latest version
tests.expected_result: Meditation session plays without interruption or crash for at least 10 minutes

steps: Update Medito app to latest version in background
Continue playing meditation session for 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: Meditation session continues to play without interruption or crash
